data.title: Unit Corporation Announces Payment and Record Dates for First Quarter Cash Dividend
data.description: Unit Corporation (OTCQX: UNTC) of Tulsa, Oklahoma has revealed plans to distribute a quarterly cash dividend of $1.25 per common stock share for Q1 2026. This payout is scheduled for March 27, 2026, to shareholders on record as of March 17, 2026. The dividend payment will be sourced from the Company's existing cash reserves. Unit Corporation operates as a publicly traded energy firm, primarily involved in oil and natural gas production.

data.title: U.S. Defense Manufacturers Face A Rare Earth Supply Squeeze - OilPrice.com Market Commentary
data.description: In a recent development, it has been reported that the Pentagon is set to enact a ban on the utilization of rare earth magnet materials sourced from China in U.S. military equipment starting from 2027. This decision is expected to significantly impact the American defense industry, with the prohibition affecting a wide range of military platforms. The move underscores efforts to reduce dependence on Chinese rare earth resources and enhance domestic security measures within the defense sector.

data.title: Snail, Inc. Reports Bellwright Surpassed 1 Million Units Sold Ahead of Full 1.0 Launch
data.description: In Culver City, California, on March 6, 2026, Snail, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNAL), known as Snail Games, revealed that their medieval survival game, Bellwright, has exceeded 1 million units sold on Steam during Early Access. This milestone underscores the game's successful Early Access run and sets up Bellwright for further business growth as it progresses towards the full 1.0 release and plans for a console launch on Xbox and PlayStation.

data.title: Kraken secures Fed account as U.S. nominee heads to Senate in a significant crypto policy change.
data.description: In a significant move towards supporting cryptocurrencies, the US Federal Reserve has granted Kraken a limited-use master account. This decision symbolizes a notable shift in policy, as Kraken becomes one of the first cryptocurrency companies to receive such authorization. The issuance of this account underscores the growing acceptance of digital assets in traditional financial systems. This development is seen as a key step in enhancing the legitimacy of cryptocurrencies and fostering their integration into mainstream financial institutions.

data.title: Silynxcom Receives Over $620,000 Tactical Systems Order from a Military Force in the Middle East
data.description: In Netanya, Israel, on March 6, 2026, Silynxcom Ltd. (NYSE American: SYNX), a company specializing in ruggedized tactical communication headsets, disclosed the receipt of a significant purchase order. The order, totaling over $620,000, originated from a military entity in the Middle East seeking Silynxcom's Tactical Systems.

data.title: VCI Global Announces US$5 Million Institutional Registered Direct Offering
data.description: In Malaysia's capital city of Kuala Lumpur on March 06, 2026, VCI Global Limited (NASDAQ: VCIG) disclosed its agreement with Esousa Group Holdings LLC from New York for the sale of the company's ordinary shares and warrants in a registered direct offering. The agreement marks a significant development for VCI Global, as it signifies a new partnership with a prominent family office in the financial hub of New York.

data.title: Earnings Summary: Imperial Ptrl Q4
data.description: Imperial Petroleum, trading under NASDAQ as IMPP, unveiled its Q4 financial performance on March 6, 2026, at 09:10 AM. The company exceeded earnings expectations by 14.71%, revealing an EPS of $0.39 compared to the estimated $0.34. Revenue witnessed a notable increase of $24.93 million from the corresponding period in the prior year. For a comprehensive overview, check out the detailed report on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Elevate Appoints Megan Fenlon as Chief Operations Officer
data.description: A well-experienced healthcare and fintech expert, Megan Fenlon, has been appointed by Elevate, a contemporary benefits administration platform, to enhance AI-driven operations, deployment, and collaborative achievements in Denver. The announcement was made on March 6, 2026.
